case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. TORINI VENIALE, ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VENIALE, TORINI AKA I. TORINI VENIALE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-2008

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VENIALE, TORINI AKA I. TORINI VENIALE $2,677.83 PRINCIPAL, $254.77 INTEREST, $245.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,177.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
